scope.name: APPROVAL_LINEAGE
scope.purpose: Define the canonical approval lineage object that binds reviewer identity, exact PR head_sha, and current review state into deterministic, replay-safe input for PREO_VALID. Approval is not legitimacy by itself — it becomes merge-relevant only when fully bound.

reviewer_identity_present.rule: reviewer_identity must be a non-empty, known identity bound to the reviewer registry. Unknown or anonymous reviewers are not permitted.

head_sha_match.rule: review_commit_sha must equal the current head_sha of the PR at the time of evaluation. Any mismatch indicates a stale or displaced approval.

review_state_approved.rule: review_state must be APPROVED. CHANGES_REQUESTED, DISMISSED, COMMENTED, and PENDING states do not satisfy approval lineage.

stale_review_rejected.rule: If the PR head has advanced since the approval was submitted (review_commit_sha !== current head_sha), the approval is stale and must be rejected.

approval_visible_to_preo.rule: The approval must be present and resolvable in the canonical EvidenceSnapshot consumed by PREO_VALID. Approvals not captured in the snapshot are not valid lineage inputs.

approval_without_head_sha_match.condition: review_commit_sha does not equal current head_sha

dismissed_or_stale_review.condition: review_state is DISMISSED, or approval was submitted against a prior commit SHA

approval_reused_after_head_change.condition: A previously valid approval is reused after the PR head SHA has changed

reviewer_identity_missing.condition: reviewer_identity is absent, null, empty, or not found in the reviewer registry

approval_not_visible_to_preo.condition: Approval is not captured in the canonical EvidenceSnapshot available to PREO_VALID

preo_integration.approval_lineage_as_preo_input: APPROVAL_LINEAGE_VALID objects are deterministic inputs to the PREO_VALID transition. APPROVAL_LINEAGE_INVALID blocks PREO_VALID.
preo_integration.approval_count_is_not_legitimacy: The count of approvals alone does not establish merge legitimacy. Each approval must independently satisfy approval lineage requirements.
preo_integration.workflow_success_not_substitute: Workflow success is not a substitute for APPROVAL_LINEAGE_VALID.

canonical_compression.rule_1: Approval is not legitimacy by itself.
canonical_compression.rule_2: Approval becomes merge-relevant only when bound to: reviewer identity, exact PR head_sha, current review state, and PREO lineage.

deterministic_artifact.rule: Identical approval inputs must produce identical APPROVAL_LINEAGE_VALID or APPROVAL_LINEAGE_INVALID outputs. The lineage hash must be reproducible from the bound fields alone.
